meaning: n.一贯作业生产系统,腰围
examples: Install beltline molding and weatherstrip seals.
Remove the inner and outer beltline weatherstrip.

The beltline trim rises slightly from the rear door towards the Cpillar.
The BeltLine is the next big major move that starts to redefine us and create who we are going to be when we grow up.
